title: Erianthera longipedunculata
taxonomy: Erianthera longipedunculata belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a species of grass that is native to Asia. Erianthera longipedunculata is further classified as a member of the genus Erianthera, which is a group of plants commonly known as long-beaked grasses. The plant is also classified as a part of the tribe Bambuseae, which comprises the bamboo family. Erianthera longipedunculata is a species of monocot plants, characterized by having one cotyledon in their seeds.
